series_metadata.series_description: This record series pertains ONLY to research and development projects financed in whole or in part with the proceeds of a Third Frontier bond issue. Records include, but are not limited to, applications, grant agreements and ancillary agreements, amendments, supporting documentation, exhibits, award letters, invoices, payments, reports, correspondence, and other records filed with and related to the project.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copies of original Project file at least six (6) years effective date of Project. ; Electronic: "Project Data" during three-year period following final maturity or redemption date of bond issue from which funds were used support Project, or, if later, while any refunding bonds that refund bond issue are outstanding and three-year period following final maturity or redemption date of any of refunding bonds. "Project Data" will include: name of grant recipient, a brief project description, a summary of scope of work, and vendor payment information. NOTES: Statutory or regulatory provisions may affect retention requirements and will take precedence over retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Records subject litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
